title: 10 health benefits of Ilex aquifolium (holly)
intro: Ilex aquifolium has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce the risk of infections, and soothe skin irritations. Its berries are rich in vitamin C and anthocyanins, which have antioxidant effects that may improve cardiovascular health and boost immune function. For example, holly tea has been used to treat respiratory issues, while its extracts have shown promise in reducing pain and inflammation associated with conditions like fibromyalgia.
